## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like it to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternatives you considered.

## Example UX

If relevant, describe:
- menu flow
- prompts
- output style
- expected behavior

## Additional Context

Anything else that may help.
